question: How does the breadth look like?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_window_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date AS window_end_date_52w,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date_52w
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
)
SELECT
  w.window_start_date_52w AS window_start_date_52w,
  w.window_end_date_52w AS window_end_date_52w,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_campus_accounts_52w,
  SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_mg_52w
FROM data_867 d
CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_window_bounds w
WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date_52w
  AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date_52w
  AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
GROUP BY
  w.window_start_date_52w,
  w.window_end_date_52w;

question: Are we too dependent on certain regions for revenue?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
),
time_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date AS window_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
region_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS region_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= tw.window_start_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= tw.window_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
nation_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS nation_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= tw.window_start_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= tw.window_end_date
),
contribution_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.region_sales_52w,
    n.nation_sales_52w,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY r.region_sales_52w DESC, r.campus_region ASC) AS region_rank,
    CAST(
      ROUND((r.region_sales_52w / NULLIF(n.nation_sales_52w, 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER
    ) AS region_contribution_52w_pct_int
  FROM region_agg_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_agg_cte n
),
concentration_summary_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank = 1 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_1_region_contribution_52w_pct_int,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank <= 2 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_2_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank <= 3 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_3_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int
  FROM contribution_cte c
)
SELECT
  tw.window_start_date AS window_start_date,
  tw.window_end_date AS window_end_date,
  c.campus_region,
  c.region_sales_52w,
  c.nation_sales_52w,
  CONCAT(c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "region_contribution_52w%",
  c.region_rank,
  CONCAT(cs.top_1_region_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_1_region_contribution_52w%",
  CONCAT(cs.top_2_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_2_regions_contribution_52w%",
  CONCAT(cs.top_3_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_3_regions_contribution_52w%"
FROM contribution_cte c
CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
CROSS JOIN concentration_summary_cte cs
ORDER BY c.region_sales_52w DESC
LIMIT 10;

import plotly.express as px import plotly.graph_objects as go dff = df.copy() dff["contrib_pct"] = dff["region_contribution_52w%"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).astype(float) window_start = str(dff["WINDOW_START_DATE"].iloc[0]) window_end = str(dff["WINDOW_END_DATE"].iloc[0]) nation_sales = float(dff["NATION_SALES_52W"].iloc[0]) top1 = dff["top_1_region_contribution_52w%"].iloc[0] top2 = dff["top_2_regions_contribution_52w%"].iloc[0] top3 = dff["top_3_regions_contribution_52w%"].iloc[0] title = ( f"Relmora Sales Concentration by Campus Region (Latest 52 Weeks: {window_start} to {window_end})" f"
National total: {nation_sales:,.0f} mg | Top 1: {top1} | Top 2: {top2} | Top 3: {top3}" ) fig = px.bar( dff.sort_values("REGION_SALES_52W", ascending=False), x="CAMPUS_REGION", y="REGION_SALES_52W", text="region_contribution_52w%", title=title ) fig.update_traces( marker_line_width=0, textposition="outside", cliponaxis=False, hovertemplate=( "Region=%{x}" "
52W Sales (mg)=%{y:,.0f}" "
Contribution=%{text}" "" ), ) fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=dff["CAMPUS_REGION"], y=dff["contrib_pct"], mode="lines+markers", name="Contribution (%)", line=dict(width=2), marker=dict(size=7), hovertemplate=( "Region=%{x}" "
Contribution=%{y:.0f}%" "" ), ) ) fig.update_layout( xaxis_title="Campus Region", yaxis_title="Relmora Sales (mg), 52W", legend_title_text="Metric", bargap=0.25, hovermode="x unified", margin=dict(l=60, r=60, t=80, b=60), ) fig.update_yaxes(rangemode="tozero")

question: Provide weekly sales trend by area and nation

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_last52w AS (
  SELECT
    s.week_end_date,
    s.relmora_total_mg,
    s.campus_region
  FROM data_867 s
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
weekly_pivot_sales AS (
  SELECT
    b.week_end_date,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'Central' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_central,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'Great Lakes' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_great_lakes,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'North East' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_north_east,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'Mid Atlantic' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_mid_atlantic,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'South East' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_south_east,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(b.relmora_total_mg), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_nation
  FROM base_last52w b
  GROUP BY
    b.week_end_date
)
SELECT
  w.week_end_date,
  w.sales_central,
  w.sales_great_lakes,
  w.sales_north_east,
  w.sales_mid_atlantic,
  w.sales_south_east,
  w.sales_nation
FROM weekly_pivot_sales w
ORDER BY
  w.week_end_date ASC;

Week End: %{{x|%Y-%m-%d}}
Sales: %{{y:,}}", ) ) fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=df["WEEK_END_DATE"], y=df["SALES_NATION"], mode="lines", name="Nation", line=dict(width=3, color="black", dash="dash"), hovertemplate="Nation
Week End: %{x|%Y-%m-%d}
Sales: %{y:,}", ) ) fig.update_layout( title="Weekly Sales Trend (Most Recent 52 Weeks)", xaxis_title="Week End Date", yaxis_title="Sales (mg)", hovermode="x unified", legend_title_text="Area", template="plotly_white", margin=dict(l=60, r=30, t=60, b=50), ) fig.update_xaxes(showgrid=True, tickformat="%Y-%m-%d") fig.update_yaxes(showgrid=True, rangemode="tozero")

question: Give me sales by week for recent 52 weeks?

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (

rolling_52w_start_cte AS (

  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
)
SELECT
  s.week_end_date,
  CAST(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales
FROM data_867 s

  AND s.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
GROUP BY
  s.week_end_date
ORDER BY
  s.week_end_date ASC;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_start_cte s
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN s.start_week_end_date AND m.max_week_end_date
),
parent_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS parent_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY parent_id, parent_account_name
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parent_id,
    ps.parent_account_name,
    ps.parent_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(100 * ps.parent_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS parent_contribution_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(100 * ps.parent_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS parent_contribution_52w_value
  FROM parent_sales_cte ps
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  parent_sales_52w,
  parent_contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY parent_contribution_52w_value DESC, parent_sales_52w DESC, parent_account_name ASC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.express as px df_plot = df.copy() df_plot["PARENT_SALES_52W"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot["PARENT_SALES_52W"], errors="coerce") df_plot["PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_PCT"] = pd.to_numeric( df_plot["PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_52W"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False), errors="coerce" ) df_plot = df_plot.dropna(subset=["PARENT_SALES_52W", "PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_PCT"]) df_plot = df_plot[df_plot["PARENT_SALES_52W"] > 0].sort_values(["PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_PCT", "PARENT_SALES_52W"], ascending=False) top_n = 25 df_top = df_plot.head(top_n).sort_values(["PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_PCT", "PARENT_SALES_52W"], ascending=True) fig = px.bar( df_top, x="PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_PCT", y="PARENT_ACCOUNT_NAME", orientation="h", color="PARENT_SALES_52W", color_continuous_scale="Blues", labels={ "PARENT_CONTRIBUTION_PCT": "Contribution to National Relmora Sales (%, last 52w)", "PARENT_ACCOUNT_NAME": "Parent Account", "PARENT_SALES_52W": "Relmora Sales (mg, last 52w)" }, title=f"Top {top_n} Parent Accounts by Contribution to National Relmora Sales (Last 52 Weeks)" ) fig.update_traces( hovertemplate=( "Parent Account: %{y}
" "Contribution: %{x:.0f}%
" "Sales (mg, 52w): %{marker.color:,.0f}
" "" ) ) fig.update_layout( coloraxis_colorbar=dict(title="Sales (mg, 52w)"), xaxis=dict(ticksuffix="%", rangemode="tozero"), yaxis=dict(categoryorder="array", categoryarray=df_top["PARENT_ACCOUNT_NAME"].tolist()), margin=dict(l=200, r=30, t=60, b=40) )

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM data_867 b
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_start_cte s
  WHERE b.week_end_date BETWEEN s.start_week_end_date AND m.max_week_end_date
),
segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS segment_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ss.parent_id,
    ss.parent_account_name,
    ss.campus_tier,
    CAST(ROUND(ss.segment_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS segment_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nt.national_total_sales_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (100 * ss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0)
          END,
          0
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(
        ROUND((100 * ss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER
      )
    END AS contribution_52w_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte ss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  campus_tier,
  segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_52w_value DESC,
  segment_sales_52w DESC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.express as px df_plot = df.copy() df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT"] = ( df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_52W"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).replace("", "0") ) df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT"], errors="coerce").fillna(0) df_plot["SEGMENT_SALES_52W"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot["SEGMENT_SALES_52W"], errors="coerce").fillna(0) df_plot = df_plot[df_plot["SEGMENT_SALES_52W"] > 0].copy() tier_order = ["Tier 1", "Tier 2", "Tier 3", "No Tier"] df_plot["CAMPUS_TIER"] = pd.Categorical(df_plot["CAMPUS_TIER"], categories=tier_order, ordered=True) tier_summary = ( df_plot.groupby("CAMPUS_TIER", dropna=False, observed=False) .agg( segment_sales_52w=("SEGMENT_SALES_52W", "sum"), parent_count=("PARENT_ID", "nunique"), ) .reset_index() ) tier_summary = tier_summary.sort_values("segment_sales_52w", ascending=False) total_sales = tier_summary["segment_sales_52w"].sum() tier_summary["sales_share_pct"] = (tier_summary["segment_sales_52w"] / total_sales * 100).where(total_sales != 0, 0) fig = px.bar( tier_summary, x="CAMPUS_TIER", y="segment_sales_52w", text=tier_summary["sales_share_pct"].map(lambda v: f"{v:.1f}%"), custom_data=["sales_share_pct", "parent_count"], title="Relmora Sales (Rolling 52 Weeks) by Campus Tier", labels={ "CAMPUS_TIER": "Campus Tier", "segment_sales_52w": "Relmora Sales (mg, 52w)", }, ) fig.update_traces( hovertemplate=( "Campus Tier=%{x}" "
Relmora Sales (52w)=%{y:,}" "
Share of total=%{customdata[0]:.2f}%" "
# Parents=%{customdata[1]:,}" "" ) ) fig.update_layout( xaxis={"categoryorder": "array", "categoryarray": tier_order}, yaxis_tickformat=",", uniformtext_minsize=10, uniformtext_mode="hide", bargap=0.25, )

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m ON 1 = 1
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND t.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
  ) x
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS min_r4w_week
      FROM r4w_weeks_cte
    ) b
      ON d.week_end_date < b.min_r4w_week
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
weeks_count_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r4w_weeks_cte) AS r4w_week_cnt,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p4w_weeks_cte) AS p4w_week_cnt
),
r4w_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS r4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY t.campus_account_type
),
p4w_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_p4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY t.campus_account_type
),
child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(r.campus_account_type, p.campus_account_type) AS campus_account_type,
    COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS sales_p4w,
    r.r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    p.p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM r4w_by_child_type_cte r
  FULL OUTER JOIN p4w_by_child_type_cte p
    ON r.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
national_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS national_r4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
national_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_p4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS national_p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
national_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.national_sales_4w,
    p.national_sales_p4w,
    r.national_r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    p.national_p4w_included_week_end_dates,
    wc.r4w_week_cnt,
    wc.p4w_week_cnt,
    CASE
      WHEN (wc.r4w_week_cnt <> 4 OR wc.p4w_week_cnt <> 4) THEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) > 0
                THEN 100
              WHEN (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                THEN 0
              ELSE (
                (
                  (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) -
                  (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0))
                ) * 100.0
                / NULLIF((COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)), 0)
              )
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0)
                   / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0), 0)
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
    END AS national_growth_int,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_abs_change_4w
  FROM national_r4w_cte r
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_cte p
  CROSS JOIN weeks_count_cte wc
),
final_result_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    c.r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    c.p4w_included_week_end_dates,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_p4w,
    n.national_growth_int,
    n.national_abs_change_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN (n.r4w_week_cnt <> 4 OR n.p4w_week_cnt <> 4) THEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) > 0
                THEN 100
              WHEN (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                THEN 0
              ELSE (
                (
                  (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) -
                  (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0))
                ) * 100.0
                / NULLIF((COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)), 0)
              )
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0)
                   / NULLIF(COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0), 0)
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
    END AS child_growth_int,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w
  FROM child_type_combined_cte c
  CROSS JOIN national_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_4w,
  sales_p4w,
  CONCAT(child_growth_int, '%') AS growth_4w_pct,
  abs_change_4w,
  r4w_included_week_end_dates,
  p4w_included_week_end_dates,
  CAST(ROUND(national_sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_4w,
  CAST(ROUND(national_sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_p4w,
  CONCAT(national_growth_int, '%') AS national_growth_4w_pct,
  national_abs_change_4w AS national_abs_change_4w,
  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(child_growth_int - national_growth_int, 0) AS INTEGER), '%') AS growth_gap_vs_nation_4w_pp,
  CASE
    WHEN child_growth_int > national_growth_int THEN 'Higher'
    WHEN child_growth_int < national_growth_int THEN 'Lower'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS performance_vs_nation
FROM final_result_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.graph_objects as go from plotly.subplots import make_subplots df_plot = df.copy() # Parse percent strings to numeric for c in ["GROWTH_4W_PCT", "NATIONAL_GROWTH_4W_PCT", "GROWTH_GAP_VS_NATION_4W_PP"]: df_plot[c + "_NUM"] = ( df_plot[c] .astype(str) .str.replace("%", "", regex=False) .str.replace("−", "-", regex=False) ) df_plot[c + "_NUM"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot[c + "_NUM"], errors="coerce") # Sort by growth gap vs nation for easier comparison df_plot = df_plot.sort_values("GROWTH_GAP_VS_NATION_4W_PP_NUM", ascending=False) # Build hover text hover_text = ( "Child Type=%{x}" "
R4W Sales=%{customdata[0]:,}" "
P4W Sales=%{customdata[1]:,}" "
Child Growth=%{customdata[2]:.0f}%" "
Nation Growth=%{customdata[3]:.0f}%" "
Gap vs Nation=%{customdata[4]:.0f} pp" "
Vs Nation=%{customdata[5]}" "" ) customdata = df_plot[[ "SALES_4W", "SALES_P4W", "GROWTH_4W_PCT_NUM", "NATIONAL_GROWTH_4W_PCT_NUM", "GROWTH_GAP_VS_NATION_4W_PP_NUM", "PERFORMANCE_VS_NATION" ]].to_numpy() fig = make_subplots(specs=[[{"secondary_y": True}]]) # Base metric: sales (R4W vs P4W) fig.add_trace( go.Bar( name="Sales (R4W)", x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=df_plot["SALES_4W"], marker_color="#2E86C1", opacity=0.9, customdata=customdata, hovertemplate=hover_text, ), secondary_y=False, ) fig.add_trace( go.Bar( name="Sales (P4W)", x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=df_plot["SALES_P4W"], marker_color="#AED6F1", opacity=0.9, customdata=customdata, hovertemplate=hover_text, ), secondary_y=False, ) # Growth metric: % growth (child + national benchmark line) fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( name="Growth % (Child)", x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=df_plot["GROWTH_4W_PCT_NUM"], mode="lines+markers", line=dict(color="#1B4F72", width=3), marker=dict(size=8), customdata=customdata, hovertemplate=hover_text, ), secondary_y=True, ) national_growth_val = df_plot["NATIONAL_GROWTH_4W_PCT_NUM"].iloc[0] if len(df_plot) else None fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( name="Growth % (Nation)", x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=[national_growth_val] * len(df_plot), mode="lines", line=dict(color="#7B7D7D", width=2, dash="dash"), hovertemplate="Nation Growth=%{y:.0f}%", ), secondary_y=True, ) fig.update_layout( title_text="Relmora Sales: R4W vs P4W by Campus Account Type (with Growth % vs Nation)", barmode="group", legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="left", x=0), margin=dict(l=60, r=60, t=80, b=60), ) fig.update_yaxes( title_text="Sales (mg)", secondary_y=False, tickformat=",", rangemode="tozero", ) fig.update_yaxes( title_text="Growth (%)", secondary_y=True, ticksuffix="%", zeroline=True, zerolinecolor="rgba(0,0,0,0.25)", ) fig.add_hline( y=0, line_width=1, line_dash="dot", line_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", secondary_y=True, )

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 t
  WHERE t.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_cte)
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
  ) x
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    WHERE d.week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte w) AS r4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    t.campus_account_type
),
p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM p4w_weeks_cte w) AS p4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    t.campus_account_type
),
child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(r.campus_account_type, p.campus_account_type) AS campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0), 0)
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS growth_4w_pct_value,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_4w_pct,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w,
    COALESCE(r.r4w_weeks_included, (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte w)) AS r4w_weeks_included,
    COALESCE(p.p4w_weeks_included, (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM p4w_weeks_cte w)) AS p4w_weeks_included
  FROM r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte r
  FULL OUTER JOIN p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte p
    ON r.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
nation_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w_nation,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte w) AS r4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
nation_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_nation,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM p4w_weeks_cte w) AS p4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    n4.sales_r4w_nation,
    n13.sales_p4w_nation,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((n4.sales_r4w_nation - n13.sales_p4w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n13.sales_p4w_nation, 0), 0)
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS growth_4w_nation_pct_value,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n4.sales_r4w_nation - n13.sales_p4w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n13.sales_p4w_nation, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_4w_nation_pct,
    n4.r4w_weeks_included,
    n13.p4w_weeks_included
  FROM nation_r4w_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN nation_p4w_cte n13
),
final_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    c.sales_r4w,
    c.sales_p4w,
    c.growth_4w_pct,
    c.abs_change_4w,
    n.sales_r4w_nation,
    n.sales_p4w_nation,
    n.growth_4w_nation_pct,
    CONCAT(CAST((c.growth_4w_pct_value - n.growth_4w_nation_pct_value) AS INTEGER), '%') AS growth_gap_vs_nation_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN c.growth_4w_pct_value > n.growth_4w_nation_pct_value THEN 'Higher'
      WHEN c.growth_4w_pct_value < n.growth_4w_nation_pct_value THEN 'Lower'
      ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS vs_nation_flag,
    c.r4w_weeks_included,
    c.p4w_weeks_included
  FROM child_type_combined_cte c
  CROSS JOIN nation_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_r4w,
  sales_p4w,
  growth_4w_pct,
  abs_change_4w,
  sales_r4w_nation,
  sales_p4w_nation,
  growth_4w_nation_pct,
  growth_gap_vs_nation_pct,
  vs_nation_flag,
  r4w_weeks_included,
  p4w_weeks_included
FROM final_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.graph_objects as go from plotly.subplots import make_subplots df_plot = df.copy() # Parse percent strings to numeric df_plot["growth_4w_pct_value"] = ( df_plot["GROWTH_4W_PCT"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).astype(float) ) df_plot["growth_gap_vs_nation_pct_value"] = ( df_plot["GROWTH_GAP_VS_NATION_PCT"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).astype(float) ) nation_growth = float( str(df_plot["GROWTH_4W_NATION_PCT"].iloc[0]).replace("%", "") ) df_plot = df_plot.sort_values("growth_4w_pct_value", ascending=True) color_map = {"Higher": "#2ca02c", "Lower": "#d62728", "Equal": "#7f7f7f"} bar_colors = df_plot["VS_NATION_FLAG"].map(color_map).fillna("#1f77b4").tolist() fig = make_subplots( rows=1, cols=1, specs=[[{"secondary_y": True}]] ) fig.add_trace( go.Bar( x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=df_plot["SALES_P4W"], name="Sales (P4W)", marker_color="rgba(160,160,160,0.55)", hovertemplate="Type=%{x}
P4W Sales=%{y:,}", ), secondary_y=False, ) fig.add_trace( go.Bar( x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=df_plot["SALES_R4W"], name="Sales (R4W)", marker_color="rgba(31,119,180,0.85)", hovertemplate="Type=%{x}
R4W Sales=%{y:,}", ), secondary_y=False, ) fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=df_plot["CAMPUS_ACCOUNT_TYPE"], y=df_plot["growth_4w_pct_value"], mode="lines+markers", name="Growth % (R4W vs P4W)", marker=dict(size=9, color=bar_colors, line=dict(width=1, color="white")), line=dict(color="rgba(31,119,180,0.55)", width=2), hovertemplate="Type=%{x}
Growth=%{y:.0f}%", ), secondary_y=True, ) fig.add_hline( y=nation_growth, line_color="#ff7f0e", line_width=2, line_dash="dash", annotation_text=f"Nation growth: {nation_growth:.0f}%", annotation_position="top left", secondary_y=True, ) r4w_weeks = str(df_plot["R4W_WEEKS_INCLUDED"].iloc[0]) p4w_weeks = str(df_plot["P4W_WEEKS_INCLUDED"].iloc[0]) fig.update_layout( barmode="group", title=f"R4W vs P4W Sales and Growth by Campus Account Type
R4W weeks: {r4w_weeks} | P4W weeks: {p4w_weeks}", legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="left", x=0), margin=dict(l=60, r=60, t=90, b=60), hovermode="x unified", ) fig.update_xaxes(title_text="Campus Account Type") fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Sales (mg)", secondary_y=False, tickformat=",") fig.update_yaxes(title_text="Growth (%)", secondary_y=True, ticksuffix="%")
